title: The CakeShake. Harris Park. Apparently we have to explain it.
summary:
The CakeShake. Harris Park. Apparently we have to explain it.

A milkshake with eggless sponge cake built into it. That's it. Same sponge we put in our custom cakes — moist, dense enough to hold its shape, not dissolving the second it hits the shake.

It sounds like a novelty. People from Parramatta, Granville, and Merrylands come back for it specifically. Some from Westmead.

We're at 96 Wigram Street, open daily until 10pm. You can also order custom cakes from the same counter — 48 hours notice, 15 flavours, any design.

Order online or walk in.
keywords: unique eggless dessert Parramatta Granville Merrylands
